meta.title: Alykul — Water Adventures on Lake Issyk-Kul | Cruises, Charters & Tours
meta.description: Book unforgettable water experiences on Central Asia's largest alpine lake. Sunset cruises, private yacht charters, speed tours and kids parties — all online in 2 minutes.

hero.subtitle: Book an unforgettable water adventure on Central Asia's largest alpine lake. Cholpon-Ata, Bosteri, and beyond.

usp.title: Why Choose Alykul?
usp.subtitle: The first and only online water tourism platform on Issyk-Kul — serving Cholpon-Ata, Bosteri, and the entire northern shore
usp.online_desc: Choose your cruise, pick a date, and book in under 2 minutes
usp.fleet_desc: Every vessel is state-certified and inspected before each departure
usp.experience_desc: Trusted by 12,000+ guests for memorable water adventures on Issyk-Kul
usp.safety_desc: Life vests, trained captains, passenger insurance included on every trip
usp.multilang_desc: Full platform available in Russian, Kyrgyz, and English
usp.prices_desc: Book directly — no middleman markups, no hidden fees

schedule_section.title: Departure Times
schedule_section.subtitle: Daily departures from June 1 through September 15. Online booking is now open.

fleet_section.title: Our Fleet
fleet_section.subtitle: State-certified vessels with daily inspections — from our flagship steamship to high-speed boats
fleet_section.alykul_desc: Our flagship vessel. Perfect for sunset cruises, corporate events, weddings, and kids parties.
fleet_section.nomad_desc: Exclusive private charters, romantic getaways, and VIP experiences.
fleet_section.speedboats_desc: Adrenaline-packed tours, water skiing, wakeboarding, and fishing excursions.

about_section.title: About Us
about_section.text_1: Alykul is the first online booking platform for water tourism on Lake Issyk-Kul — the world's second-largest alpine lake, nestled at 1,607 meters in the Tian Shan mountains. Based in Cholpon-Ata and Bosteri, we combine a certified fleet of 8 vessels, experienced captains, and seamless technology to deliver unforgettable experiences on the water.
about_section.text_2: Our flagship — the steamship "Alykul" — accommodates up to 200 guests with a full banquet hall, two panoramic decks, and entertainment for the entire family.

footer.copyright: Alykul. All rights reserved. Lake Issyk-Kul, Kyrgyzstan.
